title: Data Pager Data
description: Represents the data structure containing pagination information including page details, range, and pagination metadata.

sections.title: Interface Definition
sections.description: Shape of the data pager output model.

props.name: range
props.description: The range of items currently displayed (from and to indices).

props.name: skip
props.description: The number of items to skip (offset).

props.name: take
props.description: The number of items to take (page size).

props.name: totalPages
props.description: The total number of pages available.

props.name: totalItems
props.description: The total number of items in the dataset.
